description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark, rich finish and classic design elements. The desk features three drawers on the front side, with two larger drawers on each end and a smaller central drawer, each equipped with metal handles. The legs are turned and slightly tapered, adding a traditional touch to the overall appearance. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for writing or working, and the sides and back are solid panels with no additional features. The craftsmanship suggests durability and a formal aesthetic, making it suitable for professional or upscale environments. The overall look is elegant and functional, with ample storage and workspace.
description: A large, dark wood desk with three front drawers, turned legs, and a broad flat surface, exuding a classic and formal style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with metal handles and turned legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel side and the depth of the desk.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, solid panel with no drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other solid panel side.
attribute_orientation: The side with three drawers and handles is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the solid panel side is the back.
